programs.title: Singapore Tonight
programs.desc: (Live) From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programs.title: Money Mind
programs.desc: How Thailand's fishing crisis could hit consumers' wallets. Safe havens not working as expected – so how should you invest? Young hawker's pricing trap dilemma – can he make it work?

programs.title: 3D Nation
programs.desc: While jazz legends experience new technology through bespoke 3D printed in-ear monitors, a dog suffering from Down Syndrome has his mealtimes improved with the help of 3D printing.

programs.title: Headline News
programs.desc: The latest top stories of the hour.

programs.title: East Asia Tonight
programs.desc: Spotlight on East Asia, a region steeped in history and now helping to write the future of our world. We'll break down the key stories and explain why they matter.

programs.title: Walk The Line - ICE Nation
programs.desc: Two years after following Chinese migrants on their way to the US, Wei Du returns to find them in an America transformed by raids, fear and protest — and to ask what kind of country it is becoming.
